name: Dialogs
summary: The Dialogs class contains interface methods for Tekla Structures to handle FormBase and WindowBase dialogs.

constructors.name: Dialogs
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dialogs class

methods.name: ClosePluginDialogs
methods.summary: Close all dialogs to end the threads running the corresponding message loops.

methods.name: GetPluginFormBaseByPluginFormName
methods.summary: Retrieves an instance of the form.

params.name: pluginFormName
params.doc: The complete name of the plug-in form (including the plug-in name).

returns.doc: The existing PluginFormBase or null if it did not exist.

methods.name: GetPluginWindowBaseByPluginFormName
methods.summary: Retrieves an instance of the form.

params.name: pluginFormName
params.doc: The complete name of the plug-in form (including the plug-in name).

returns.doc: The existing PluginWindowBase or null if it did not exist.

methods.name: LoadAttributeFileNameToDialogAndApply(String)
methods.summary: Uses the attributes found from the attribute file as the applied values for the specified dialog.

returns.doc: 0 always. The return value is not useful because it is not sent to the Tekla Structures core.

methods.name: LoadAttributeFileNameToDialogAndApply(String, String)
methods.signature: public static bool LoadAttributeFileNameToDialogAndApply(string attributeFileName, string pluginFormName)
methods.summary: Loads the specified dialog's applied values from the attribute file.

params.name: attributeFileName
params.doc: The name of the attribute file.

params.name: pluginFormName
params.doc: The full name of the dialog.

methods.name: LoadAttributeFileNameToDialogAndModify(String)
methods.summary: Uses the attributes found from the attribute file as the current values for the specified dialog. Modifies the current selected instance. Applied values for this dialog are not changed.

returns.doc: 0 always. The return value is not useful because it is not sent to the Tekla Structures core.

methods.name: LoadAttributeFileNameToDialogAndModify(String, String)
methods.signature: public static bool LoadAttributeFileNameToDialogAndModify(string attributeFileName, string pluginFormName)
methods.summary: Loads the specified dialog's current values from the attribute file and modifies the current selected instance.

params.name: attributeFileName
params.doc: The name of the attribute file.

params.name: pluginFormName
params.doc: The full name of the dialog.

methods.name: LoadAttributeFileNameToDialogAndSave
methods.summary: Uses the attributes found from the attribute file for the specified dialog and saves to file.

returns.doc: 0 always. The return value is not useful because it is not sent to the Tekla Structures core.

methods.name: LoadAttributeFileToStack
methods.summary: Opens a dialog and forces it to get the values from the currently selected part.

methods.name: LoadDialogs
methods.summary: Reads the PluginFormBase and PluginWindowBase dialogs from all found dll files in bin\dialogs and bin\plugins.

returns.doc: 0 always. The return value is not useful because it is not sent to the Tekla Structures core.

methods.name: OpenDialog
methods.summary: Opens a dialog. The name of the dialog is asked from the Tekla Structures core.

methods.name: OpenDialogAndGet
methods.summary: Opens a dialog and forces it to get the values from the currently selected part.

methods.name: ReloadDialogs
methods.summary: Reloads all PluginFormBase dialogs with default/standard values.

methods.name: SetSettings
methods.summary: Forces the dialog system to get the language and localization settings from Tekla Structures.
